---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Provide a clear and concise description of what the feature request is.

## Environment
* Related Engine: [k6 / JMeter / LoadRunner / custom / none]
* Target Component: [target-app / control-plane / workers / core]

## Problem / Use Case
Is your feature request related to a problem or limitation? Please describe.

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Expected Behavior
What is the expected behavior, developer workflow, or API structure of this new feature?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or references about the feature request here.
